title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrating Infrastructure as Code principles using AWS CDK with Python. The video covers building a serverless REST API with DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway, comparing manual console setup to automated CDK deployment, and explains IaC concepts and tool trade-offs.
